_description: Sample data for the Task Intelligence app: 3 projects, 5 team members, 12 tasks in various Kanban stages, 1 HW worklist definition with 4 stages (Backlog, Todo, In Progress, Done), and runtime process instances showing tasks flowing through the board.

instances._comment: === TASKS (12) - Various statuses across the Kanban board ===

task-description-prop.en: Implement automatic reconnection with exponential backoff when WS connection drops
Create accessible color palette for dashboard charts with dark mode support
Research and compare offline data sync solutions for mobile

task-title-prop.en: Fix pagination offset bug in list API

task-description-prop.en: When offset exceeds total count, API returns 500 instead of empty page
Allow users to export dashboard data as CSV files
Run cargo update and fix any breaking changes
Ensure all API routes validate tenant context from JWT
Integrate Firebase Cloud Messaging for real-time push notifications

task-title-prop.en: Write API documentation for analytics endpoints

task-description-prop.en: Document all analytics REST endpoints with OpenAPI spec
Configure GitHub Actions for build, test, and deploy

task-title-prop.en: Fix login screen crash on Android 12

task-description-prop.en: App crashes when biometric prompt is cancelled on Android 12+
Define universals and properties for aggregated analytics output

instances._comment: === HW RUNTIME: Process Instances (6 active/completed workflows) ===
instances._comment2: --- 3 In-Progress tasks have active worklist processes ---
--- 3 Done tasks have completed worklist processes ---
--- Active processes: current In Progress stage instances ---
--- Completed processes: final Done stage instances ---
